text:
Created attachment 180097
Patch

Change to GitHub

Remove BUILD_DEPENDS= and RUN_DEPENDS=

Add NO_BUILD=, PHP_DIR=, PLIST_FILES= and do-install.

Can pls check this a Committer for accuracy.

poudriere build fine for:

Cheers
jochen
